name: Essence of the Body amulet (Normal start)
description: Cheap baseline rare amulet with a guaranteed Life mod from an essence. Transmute the base to magic, essence it to rare with Life locked in, then exalt to fill any open slots.

steps.outcome: Upgrades the normal amulet to magic with one random modifier.

steps.verb: Lesser Essence of the Body (or higher tier)
steps.outcome: Upgrades the magic amulet to rare with a guaranteed +maximum Life modifier. Use Greater or Perfect tier if your item is ilvl 35+/50+ to roll higher-tier mods.
Each Exalt adds one random modifier (cap of 6 total). Stop when the result is usable — average ~3 exalts before a workable combo of resistances/attributes lands.

notes_for_user: Most reliable budget path. The guaranteed Life is your floor — even if Exalt slams land badly, the amulet is wearable. Advanced: use 'Omen of Dextral Exaltation' (held in inventory before exalting) to force suffix-only rolls and protect any open prefixes for later mod control.
